description.value:
You weave a confusing web of half-truths, conspiracy theories, and plausible motives to goad an enemy into lashing out wildly. Choose a target within 30 feet that can hear you, and attempt a @Check[diplomacy|against:will] check against its Will DC. The creature is then immune to Perplex for 24 hours.

Critical Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Confused] for 1 round.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is unaffected.
